name: @act-spec/example-eleventy-blog
description: Flat chronological Eleventy 2.x blog demonstrating ACT generation via the @act-spec/plugin-eleventy plugin.
author: Jeremy Forsythe <jeremy@act-spec.org>

scripts.conformance: pnpm run build && pnpm run validate
scripts.test: node -e "console.log('@act-spec/example-eleventy-blog: example exercises end-to-end via conformance')"
scripts.lint: node -e "console.log('@act-spec/example-eleventy-blog: lint covered by typecheck + conformance')"
